series_metadata.series_description: Forms used by a person/organization to enter into contract with an agency to request payment for services rendered or to amend contract. May include attendance forms, correspondence, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office for seven years from date of expiration. ; Paper: Retain in office for one year from date of expiration, then transfer to State Records Center for six years. Originals may be scanned to held in machine-readable format only., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
